untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of SMA slope (rate of change) and dynamic undefined zone bands around the SMA. The allowed indicator set does not include slope/momentum derivatives of moving averages, nor support for dynamic offset bands. Parameters [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] and [UNDEFINED_ZONE_WIDTH] cannot be specified without additional guidance. The undefined zone concept requires conditional band logic not expressible in the 3-field rule structure.
translation_notes: The core concept uses sma_50 as the trend indicator. Entry requires: (1) SMA slope magnitude exceeding threshold, (2) price outside undefined zone. Exit requires: (1) slope reversal/flattening, (2) price re-entering zone. Implementation would need custom slope calculation function and dynamic band offsets. Suggest parameterizing slope_threshold as ATR-based or percentage deviation from SMA to operationalize.
